description_long: This object is a compact, round-bottomed bottle with a black, glossy body and a distinctive gray metallic cap assembly. The cap features a prominent safety lever and a circular pull ring, reminiscent of a grenade-style closure, which is attached to the neck of the bottle. The lower portion of the bottle is ribbed or gear-like, providing a textured grip or possibly a reinforced base. The bottle's body is smooth and reflective, with a small area of white handwritten text visible on one side. The cap appears robust and industrial, likely made of metal, contrasting with the plastic or glass body. The overall design suggests a utilitarian or specialized function, possibly for secure storage or controlled dispensing.
description: A compact, black, glossy bottle with a metallic cap featuring a safety lever and pull ring, and a ribbed base for grip. The bottle has a utilitarian, industrial appearance with a small area of white text on its body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the metallic cap and safety lever aligned vertically, with the ribbed base and smooth black body clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the circular pull ring and the lever extending outward, with the bottle's glossy surface reflecting light.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the handwritten white text on the black body and the ribbed base, with the cap assembly seen from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the pull ring and lever from a different angle, with the bottle's smooth, reflective surface and ribbed base.
attribute_label_or_branding: White handwritten text on the side of the bottle body, reading '4.10.98'. No other visible branding or logos.
